tldr_zh: AI巨頭強化選舉安全、企業應用，輝達重金投資台灣，Meta推訂閱含AI功能，全球科技政策與衝突升溫。
tldr_en: AI giants boost election security and enterprise applications, Nvidia invests heavily in Taiwan, Meta launches subscriptions with AI, while global tech policies and conflicts intensify.

items.title_zh: OpenAI強化選舉安全與透明度，應對全球大選挑戰
items.title_en: OpenAI Bolsters Election Safeguards and Transparency Ahead of Global Elections
items.summary_zh: OpenAI宣布將在2026年全球大選前，加強其平台在選舉資訊方面的安全措施，協助用戶獲取可靠資訊、支援網路防禦者並提升AI透明度，以應對潛在的濫用風險。此舉顯示AI公司正積極承擔社會責任，以維護民主進程。
items.summary_en: OpenAI announced enhanced safeguards for election information ahead of global elections in 2026, aiming to help people access reliable information, support cyber defenders, and increase AI transparency. This initiative highlights AI companies' proactive efforts to address potential misuse and uphold democratic processes.

items.title_zh: 思科與OpenAI合作，利用Codex重塑企業工程開發
items.title_en: Cisco and OpenAI Partner to Redefine Enterprise Engineering with Codex
items.summary_zh: 思科與OpenAI正透過Codex模型重新定義企業工程，協助思科擴展AI原生開發、加速AI防禦工作並自動化缺陷修復。這項合作展示了大型企業如何利用先進AI技術提升效率和安全性，推動AI在企業級應用中的普及。
items.summary_en: Cisco and OpenAI are leveraging the Codex model to redefine enterprise engineering, helping Cisco scale AI-native development, accelerate AI defense work, and automate defect remediation. This collaboration demonstrates how large enterprises are adopting advanced AI to enhance efficiency and security, driving AI's widespread application in the enterprise sector.

items.title_zh: YouTube將自動標記AI生成影片，提升內容透明度
items.title_en: YouTube to Automatically Label AI-Generated Videos for Enhanced Transparency
items.summary_zh: YouTube宣布將自動偵測並標記平台上由AI生成的影片，以提高內容透明度，讓觀眾能清楚辨識哪些內容是AI創作或修改的。此政策旨在應對AI內容激增帶來的挑戰，確保資訊的真實性與用戶信任。
items.summary_en: YouTube announced it will automatically detect and label AI-generated videos on its platform to enhance content transparency, allowing viewers to clearly identify AI-created or modified content. This policy aims to address challenges posed by the surge in AI content, ensuring information authenticity and user trust.

items.title_zh: Meta推出Instagram、Facebook與WhatsApp付費訂閱，未來將整合AI功能
items.title_en: Meta Launches Paid Subscriptions for Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp, with Future AI Integration
items.summary_zh: Meta正全球推出Instagram、Facebook和WhatsApp的付費訂閱服務，並計畫在未來將AI功能納入其更廣泛的「Meta One」訂閱品牌中。此舉顯示Meta正積極探索新的營收模式，並將AI視為其核心產品體驗的重要組成部分。
items.summary_en: Meta is rolling out paid subscription plans for Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp globally, with plans to integrate AI features into its broader "Meta One" subscription brand in the future. This move indicates Meta's active exploration of new revenue models and its commitment to making AI a core component of its product experience.

items.title_zh: 輝達執行長黃仁勳宣布每年投資1500億美元，將台灣打造成AI中心
items.title_en: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang Pledges $150 Billion Annual Investment to Make Taiwan an AI Hub
items.summary_zh: 輝達執行長黃仁勳宣布，公司每年將投資1500億美元，旨在將台灣打造成全球AI革命的中心，而非美國。此項巨額投資凸顯台灣在全球半導體供應鏈中的關鍵地位，以及輝達對其AI戰略佈局的重視。
items.summary_en: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang announced the company will invest $150 billion annually to make Taiwan the center of the global AI revolution, rather than the US. This massive investment underscores Taiwan's critical role in the global semiconductor supply chain and Nvidia's strategic focus on its AI initiatives.

items.title_zh: Snowflake與AWS簽署60億美元大單，確保AI運算晶片供應
items.title_en: Snowflake Secures $6 Billion Deal with AWS for AI CPU Chips
items.summary_zh: 數據雲公司Snowflake與亞馬遜網路服務（AWS）簽署了一項為期五年、價值60億美元的重大協議，以確保其AI運算所需的晶片供應。這筆交易顯示了對AI晶片需求的急劇增長，以及雲服務提供商在AI基礎設施競爭中的戰略佈局。
items.summary_en: Data cloud company Snowflake has signed a significant five-year, $6 billion deal with Amazon Web Services (AWS) to secure chips for its AI computing needs. This transaction highlights the surging demand for AI chips and the strategic positioning of cloud service providers in the competitive AI infrastructure landscape.

items.title_zh: Google員工涉嫌利用內部資訊，在預測市場Polymarket獲利120萬美元遭起訴
items.title_en: Google Employee Charged with Fraud for Allegedly Using Inside Information to Win $1.2 Million on Polymarket
items.summary_zh: 一名Google員工因涉嫌利用內部機密資訊，在預測市場Polymarket上就Google搜尋趨勢相關賭注獲利120萬美元，遭到聯邦檢察官起訴。此事件凸顯了科技巨頭內部資訊安全與員工行為規範的嚴峻挑戰。
items.summary_en: A Google employee has been charged with fraud by federal prosecutors for allegedly using confidential internal information to win $1.2 million on Polymarket bets related to Google Search trends. This incident highlights the severe challenges in information security and employee conduct within major tech companies.

items.title_zh: 數發部資安署警告：中國高德地圖App具高風險行為
items.title_en: Taiwan's Ministry of Digital Affairs Warns: China's Amap App Poses High Security Risks
items.summary_zh: 數位發展部資通安全署（資安署）公布對四款中國App的資安檢測結果，指出高德地圖在Android和iOS平台均驗出多項高風險行為，包括過度收集用戶資料。此警告提醒民眾使用中國應用程式時需注意潛在的資安風險。
items.summary_en: Taiwan's Ministry of Digital Affairs (MODA) Cybersecurity Administration announced security test results for four Chinese apps, highlighting that Amap (Gaode Maps) exhibited multiple high-risk behaviors on both Android and iOS platforms, including excessive user data collection. This warning advises the public to be aware of potential security risks when using Chinese applications.

items.title_zh: 美國NIST公布後量子密碼數位簽章標準化新進展，9款演算法晉級第三輪
items.title_en: NIST Announces Progress in Post-Quantum Cryptography Digital Signature Standardization, 9 Algorithms Advance to Round 3
items.summary_zh: 美國國家標準與技術研究院（NIST）宣布，其後量子密碼（PQC）數位簽章競賽有9項演算法晉級第三輪標準化評選。此舉旨在建立多元的PQC標準，以應對未來量子電腦可能破解現有加密技術的威脅，確保全球資訊安全。
items.summary_en: The U.S. National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST) announced that nine algorithms have advanced to the third round of its Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC) digital signature standardization competition. This initiative aims to establish diverse PQC standards to counter the future threat of quantum computers breaking current encryption technologies, ensuring global information security.

items.title_zh: 英國簽證網站洩露數千申請人護照與自拍照，並對媒體發出律師函
items.title_en: UK Visa Portal Leaks Thousands of Applicants' Passports and Selfies, Sends Lawyers After Media Report
items.summary_zh: 英國簽證申請網站被揭露洩露了數千名申請人的護照、自拍照和位置數據，但該網站非但沒有修復問題，反而向報導此事的媒體發出律師函。此事件凸顯了嚴重的數據安全漏洞和對透明度的漠視。
items.summary_en: A third-party website for UK visa applications was found to have exposed thousands of applicants' passports, selfies, and location data. Instead of fixing the issue, the website reportedly sent lawyers to the media outlet that reported the leak. This incident highlights severe data security vulnerabilities and a disregard for transparency.

items.title_zh: 以色列軍方命令黎巴嫩南部居民撤離，衝突恐升級
items.title_en: Israeli Military Orders Evacuation of Southern Lebanon Residents, Signaling Potential Escalation
items.summary_zh: 以色列軍方已向黎巴嫩南部地區的居民發出撤離命令，並將Zahrani河以南地區劃為「戰鬥區」，威脅對真主黨發動新的打擊。此舉預示著以色列與真主黨之間的衝突可能進一步升級，加劇中東地區的緊張局勢。
items.summary_en: The Israeli military has issued an evacuation order for residents in southern Lebanon, designating areas south of the Zahrani River as "combat zones" and threatening new strikes against Hezbollah. This action signals a potential escalation of the conflict between Israel and Hezbollah, intensifying tensions in the Middle East.

items.title_zh: 伊朗網際網路服務恢復，但仍面臨嚴格限制
items.title_en: Iran's Internet Services Restored After Months-Long Shutdown, But Restrictions Remain
items.summary_zh: 經過數月的關閉後，伊朗的網際網路服務已恢復，但用戶仍面臨嚴格的限制。儘管網路重新上線，政府對資訊流動的控制依然嚴密，這對伊朗民眾的資訊自由和社會活動造成持續影響。
items.summary_en: After a months-long shutdown, internet services in Iran have been restored, but users still face heavy restrictions. Despite the return of online access, government control over information flow remains tight, continuously impacting Iranians' freedom of information and social activities.
